title: Haru
overview: Haru is a girl who transforms into a fighter jet while trying to catch a hat blowing away in the wind.

title: Rin
overview: Rin joyfully runs towards the gas station as she prepares to transform into a sports car.

title: Itsuki
overview: Itsuki is shy, but her adorer wants her to transform into the Rolling Cutter.

title: Nana
overview: Nana flies over the ocean, and sees a girl in peril in need of rescue.

title: Arisa
overview: Arisa must finish an order of Okonomiyaki.
